description: Craigslist watcher and triage tool that knows what's a repost, what's a scam, and what just dropped in price.

tools.name: postings_search
tools.description: Search Craigslist postings for a query within a city and category. Optional: query, searchPath (default: sss), cc (default: US) (plus 9 more). Returns the SearchResults.

params.name: query
params.description: Search query string (matches title and body)

params.name: searchPath
params.description: Category abbreviation (e.g. sss for all-for-sale, apa for apartments, sof for software jobs)

params.name: cc
params.description: Country code (US, CA, GB, AU, etc.)

params.name: batch
params.description: Pagination batch in the form <page>-0-360-0-0; use 1-0-360-0-0 for the first page

params.name: hasPic
params.description: Set to 1 to require listings with a picture

params.name: postal
params.description: ZIP / postal code to anchor distance filtering

params.name: search_distance
params.description: Distance in miles from postal code

params.name: srchType
params.description: Set to T to search titles only

params.name: sort
params.description: Sort order: date, rel, priceasc, pricedsc
